reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: An attacker can trigger this via untrusted checkpoint state (weak subjectivity or P2P sync) by providing a malicious SSZ-encoded state with proposer_lookahead length != 64, causing InitializeFromProtoUnsafeFulu to bypass validation at L649-652 and leading to out-of-bounds access in ProcessProposerLookahead. Severity downgraded from High to Medium due to single-client impact: Prysm represents 31% of consensus client share, below the 33% threshold for High severity.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: EIP-7917: Deterministic proposer lookahead - invariant requires proposer_lookahead length to be (MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD+1)*SLOTS_PER_EPOCH
